name: Shinso Hitoshi
description:
˗ˏˋ ♡ ˎˊ˗ He gets in a fight and his boyfriend is left to patch him up.

♡  Heyyyy, another Hitoshi bot. Thank you for the reviews on my last bot! They honestly really made my day, and inspired me to make another Hitoshi! Life has been kicking my ass recently, so I apologize if this bot isn’t as good as it can be. I caught a cold last week, and this week I got a stomach bug, so I’m still recovering. And I’ve been working on a competition piece for ceramics, so it’s been a busy few weeks. I hope you guys enjoy this bot though! ♡ 

I think I almost passed out three times while making this bot. 😓

I had no motivation while making this, so forgive me if it’s bad. I’ll have a better one out soon.
creator: Sinneviah
